label: PostgreSQL

schema_introspection.tables: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE' ORDER BY table_name
schema_introspection.columns_template: SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = %s ORDER BY ordinal_position
schema_introspection.constraints_template: SELECT constraint_name, constraint_type FROM information_schema.table_constraints WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = %s

schema_detail_introspection.command: python3 main.py --command schema_detail --db-uri postgresql://... --table users --format json
schema_detail_introspection.columns: information_schema.columns filtered by table_schema='public' and table_name=%s
schema_detail_introspection.constraints: information_schema.table_constraints joined to key_column_usage and constraint_column_usage
schema_detail_introspection.indexes: pg_class joined to pg_index, pg_attribute, and pg_namespace

notes: PostgreSQL supports LIMIT/OFFSET and richer cursor/window alternatives.

joins.inner: SELECT ... FROM left_table INNER JOIN right_table ON ...
joins.left: SELECT ... FROM left_table LEFT JOIN right_table ON ...
joins.right: SELECT ... FROM left_table RIGHT JOIN right_table ON ...
joins.full: SELECT ... FROM left_table FULL JOIN right_table ON ...
joins.cross: SELECT ... FROM left_table CROSS JOIN right_table
joins.lateral: SELECT ... FROM left_table JOIN LATERAL (...) alias ON true

notes: Use information_schema or pg_catalog when detailed metadata is needed.

upsert.template: INSERT INTO table_name (...) VALUES (...) ON CONFLICT (...) DO UPDATE SET ...

safety_notes: CoQuery PostgreSQL support is limited to schema/schema_detail/query/insert/update/delete smoke-proven paths.
Do not claim broad PostgreSQL parity.
